## Rules

- Preserve confident flagship identity.
- Preserve evidence-led writing.
- Keep `release1`, `release2`, and `release3` naming.
- Keep paragraphs concise.
- Use human senior-engineer tone.
- Do not invent evidence.
- Do not add defensive language.
- Use placeholders where evidence or diagrams are not finalized.

## Output

Do not edit files.
